privacy_policy.en-US: Flow2API Token Updater is a local browser extension for users who run their own Flow2API service. After the user enters a Flow2API address and grants access to that site, the extension reads the Google Labs session cookie from labs.google, may read the local admin session state from the user's already logged-in Flow2API console in the same browser to auto-discover the plugin connection token, and syncs the current browser profile's session only to the user's own Flow2API endpoint at /api/plugin/update-token. Local sync state, the remembered Labs session context, and logs are stored in browser local storage. In Firefox-based browsers, recent sync state and the remembered Labs session context are scoped to the active cookie store or container so different signed-in accounts inside one profile do not overwrite each other. If a reusable browser login still exists but the related page is not open, the extension may silently open labs.google or the user's own Flow2API /manage page in a background tab to rediscover the session and then close the temporary tab. Before overwriting an existing Flow2API token, the extension attempts to validate the candidate Labs session and ignores stale Labs cookies whose browser expiration date is misleadingly long; if a candidate session cannot be validated yet, the extension keeps the current token and retries later instead of overwriting it blindly. The extension does not send analytics, advertising, telemetry, or tracking data to the developer.
privacy_policy.zh-CN: Flow2API Token Updater 是一个本地浏览器扩展，面向部署自己 Flow2API 服务的用户。用户填写 Flow2API 地址并授权访问该站点后，扩展会从 labs.google 读取 Google Labs 会话 Cookie；必要时也会在同一浏览器内读取用户已登录的 Flow2API 控制台本地管理员登录状态，以自动发现插件连接 Token，并且只会把当前浏览器 Profile 的会话同步到用户自己的 Flow2API 接口 /api/plugin/update-token。同步状态、最近一次成功同步所对应的 Labs 会话上下文以及运行日志都保存在浏览器本地存储中；在 Firefox / Zen 里，这些最近同步状态和会话上下文还会按当前 cookie store / container 分开保存，避免同一个 Profile 内不同账号互相覆盖。如果浏览器里仍保留可复用的登录态但页面没有打开，扩展可能会在后台静默打开 labs.google 或用户自己的 Flow2API /manage 页面重新发现会话，并在完成后自动关闭临时标签页。在覆盖现有 Flow2API token 之前，扩展会尽量先验证候选 Labs 会话；如果识别到的是已经失效但 Cookie 过期时间看起来很长的旧 Cookie，扩展会忽略它；如果当前还无法验证这枚 Cookie 是否可用，扩展会保留现有 token，稍后继续自动重试，而不是盲目覆盖。扩展不会向开发者发送分析、广告、遥测或跟踪数据。
